title: Loews reports strong 3Q earnings, supported by insurance operations
text: Loews (NYSE:L) has reported a strong recovery in third-quarter revenue and earnings, supported by its insurance business and higher investment income. The conglomerate grew revenue to $3.93 billion for the three months to September 30, 2023, up from $3.46 billion in 3Q 2022.

title: LOEWS CORPORATION REPORTS NET INCOME OF $253 MILLION FOR THE THIRD QUARTER OF 2023
text: NEW YORK , Oct. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Loews Corporation (NYSE: L) today released its third quarter 2023 financial results. Third  Quarter highlights:  Loews Corporation reported net income of $253 million, or $1.12 per share, in the third quarter of 2023 compared to a net loss of $22 million, or $0.09 per share, in the third quarter of 2022.

title: Loews Hollywood Reaches Union Agreement with UNITE HERE Local 11; Strikes Continue in Downtown LA and Other SoCal Hotels
text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--After a historic summer of strikes, UNITE HERE Local 11 and Loews Hollywood have reached a tentative agreement. The Loews Hollywood joins the Westin Bonaventure and the historic Biltmore Los Angeles in signing an agreement with their workers. “I am extremely glad we came to an agreement that helps us and the hotel move forward,” said Maria Camarena, housekeeper of 21 years. “My coworkers and I never gave up, and we will continue to support other hotel workers as th.

title: Loews Corporation to Release Third Quarter 2023 Results on October 30, 2023
text: NEW YORK , Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Loews Corporation (NYSE: L) will report third quarter 2023 financial results on Monday, October 30, 2023. On that date the Company will also post earnings remarks on its website.
